servicesPage.intro: At Randall's Landscaping, we offer a full range of landscaping services to enhance your Dallas property. Whether you need routine lawn care or a complete landscape overhaul, our team delivers exceptional results.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your lawn lush and healthy with our comprehensive maintenance programs.
services.longDescription: Our lawn care services include mowing, fertilization, weed control, aeration, and seasonal cleanups. We tailor schedules to your lawn's needs, ensuring vibrant growth year-round.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your lawn's condition and discuss your goals.

process.title: Custom Plan
process.description: We create a maintenance schedule tailored to your lawn.

process.title: Ongoing Care
process.description: Our team executes the plan with precision and consistency.

faqs.question: How often should I mow my lawn?
faqs.answer: Typically once a week during growing season, but we adjust based on grass type and weather.

faqs.question: Do you use organic fertilizers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer organic options upon request.

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Transform your outdoor space with custom design and professional installation.
services.longDescription: From concept to completion, we design and install landscapes that reflect your style. Our team handles plant selection, bed preparation, irrigation, and more to create a cohesive look.
benefits: Personalized design tailored to your property
Expert plant selection for Dallas climate
Professional installation with attention to detail

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and site conditions.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a detailed plan and 3D renderings.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our crew brings the design to life with precision.

faqs.question: How long does a design project take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 1-3 weeks from design to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing landscape?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can enhance or completely redesign your current layout.

services.title: Hardscaping & Outdoor Living
services.shortDescription: Build stunning patios, walkways, and outdoor features that last.
services.longDescription: Enhance your outdoor living with custom hardscaping. We specialize in patios, retaining walls, walkways, fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and drainage solutions using premium materials.

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: We create a layout that fits your space and needs.

process.title: Site Preparation
process.description: We excavate and prepare the area for construction.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our skilled team builds your hardscape with precision.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We use natural stone, pavers, concrete, and brick, sourced from top suppliers.

faqs.question: Do you offer drainage solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design and install drainage systems to protect your hardscape and property.

services.title: Seasonal Cleanup & Tree Care
services.shortDescription: Prepare your property for every season with expert cleanup and tree services.
services.longDescription: Our seasonal cleanup services include leaf removal, pruning, mulching, and tree trimming. We also offer tree removal and stump grinding for safety and aesthetics.
benefits: Mulching to retain moisture and suppress weeds
Safe tree removal and stump grinding

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess your property and identify needs.

process.title: Cleanup & Pruning
process.description: We remove debris, prune trees, and apply mulch.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.description: We ensure everything is clean and to your satisfaction.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tree pruning?
faqs.answer: Late winter or early spring is ideal for most trees, but we can prune year-round as needed.

faqs.question: Do you dispose of removed trees?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle all debris removal and disposal.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Landscaping Company
about.mission: To enhance the beauty and value of Dallas properties through exceptional landscaping services, built on integrity, quality, and customer satisfaction.
story: Randall's Landscaping was founded with a simple mission: bring professionalism and artistry to outdoor spaces in Dallas. What started as a small lawn care operation has grown into a full-service landscaping company known for its attention to detail and reliable service. Our founder, Randall, believed that every property deserves a landscape that inspires, and that belief still drives us today.

Over the years, we've had the privilege of transforming hundreds of yards, from cozy bungalows in Lakewood to sprawling estates in Preston Hollow. Our team of skilled designers, horticulturists, and craftsmen work together to deliver results that exceed expectations. We're proud to be a part of the Dallas community and look forward to helping you create your perfect outdoor space.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, using quality materials and honest practices.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We strive for perfection in every project, no matter the size.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We promote eco-friendly practices, from native plants to efficient irrigation.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and give back to the neighborhoods we serve.

contact.headline: Let's Create Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Ready to get started? Reach out for a free consultation and estimate.
